data.body: 1fdc claimed. Mechanics gathered: two_clones fixture (bare remote + clones A/B on shared tickets branch), _engine_run(repo,*args) in-process CLI with pinned REBAR_ROOT, REBAR_HLC_NOW overrides physical_now, compact --horizon=<ns> + --skip-sync, engine_env() returns mutable env dict. Existing tests use manual file-copy union (what 1fdc replaces with real push/fetch/merge). Delegating test authoring for scenarios A (normal horizon, real remote append visible w/o repair) + B (far-future snapshot ts forces orphan, fsck --repair converges, both clones byte-equal show).
